videomancer.title: Connect Power
videomancer.description: Plug the included 12V DC power supply into the barrel jack on the rear panel.

videomancer.title: Connect HDMI
videomancer.description: Connect your HDMI source to HDMI IN and HDMI OUT to your display.

videomancer.title: Power On & Load a Program
videomancer.description: Switch power on, press SYSTEM, then use the Rotary Encoder to browse and load a program like Passthru or Prism.

chromagnon.title: Install in Eurorack Case
chromagnon.description: Mount Chromagnon in your eurorack case and connect the power ribbon cable.

chromagnon.title: Connect Video I/O
chromagnon.description: Connect a video source to the input jacks and your display to the output jacks.

chromagnon.title: Explore the Controls
chromagnon.description: Use the front panel controls to process and transform your video signal.
